---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

### Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way? Why does this matter?

### Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it changes the CLI, sketch the command; if it changes
the model or protocol, describe the behavior.

### Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why they fall short.

### Additional context

Anything else — links, prior art in other VCSs, screenshots.
